info.name: Multi-City Event Booking — Full E2E (FR1–FR8 + FR10)
info.description:
Complete collection covering all functional flows:

- FR1: City, Venue & Event Discovery
- FR2: Show Scheduling & Slot Management (Admin)
- FR3: User Registration, Auth & Profile
- FR4: Seat Selection & Cart Assembly
- FR5: Payment via Stripe & Booking Confirmation
- FR6: Cancellation & Stripe Refund
- FR7: Coupon Engine & Discount Application
- FR8: Review Submission & Auto-Moderation
- FR10: Seat Lock State Machine (Hero Feature)
- Admin: Admin Endpoints Reference
- Health: Actuator & Debug endpoints

Base URL: http://localhost:8080
Import the companion environment: multi-city-event-booking.postman_environment.json

item.name: FR1 — City, Venue & Event Discovery
item.description: Module: discovery-catalog. No auth required for read endpoints.

item.name: FR2 — Show Scheduling (Admin)
item.description: Module: scheduling. Requires ROLE_ADMIN JWT. Run 'FR3 — Admin Login' first.

body.raw:
{
  "venueId": 1,
  "description": "An epic rock concert featuring top artists",
  "startTime": "2026-06-15T19:00:00",
  "endTime": "2026-06-15T22:00:00",
  "seatingMode": "RESERVED",
  "pricingTiers": [
    {
      "name": "GENERAL",
      "priceAmount": 50000,
      "currency": "INR",
      "quota": 200,
      "tierType": "GENERAL_ADMISSION"
    },
    {
      "name": "VIP",
      "priceAmount": 150000,
      "currency": "INR",
      "quota": 50,
      "tierType": "RESERVED"
    }
  ],
  "title": "Rock Night 2026",
  "capacity": 200,
  "isRecurring": false,
  "sourceSeatMapId": "seatmap-venue-1"
}

exec: console.log('⏳ Wait 1-2s for seat provisioning event to process...');

item.name: FR3 — User Registration & Auth
item.description: Module: identity. Register, login, profile, wallet, preferences.

item.name: FR4 — Seat Selection & Cart Assembly
item.description: Module: booking-inventory. Requires ROLE_USER JWT. Pre-req: FR2 slot must be ACTIVE.

item.name: 4.2 Add Seat to Cart (Triggers Redis Soft Lock)

exec: console.log('✅ Cart confirmed — HARD_LOCKED. Now call 5.1 Checkout Summary to get PAYMENT_INTENT_ID');
console.log('✅ Coupon applied, PAYMENT_INTENT_ID set to', data.paymentIntentId);

item.name: FR5 — Payment via Stripe & Booking Confirmation
item.description: Module: payments-ticketing. Pre-req: Cart confirmed (4.6), PAYMENT_INTENT_ID set. Run stripe CLI to confirm payment first.

exec: console.log('Verify Redis is empty: redis-cli keys seat:lock:*');
// Signature check will fail in prod — use Stripe CLI for real webhook testing
console.log('Use Stripe CLI for production webhook: stripe listen --forward-to http://localhost:8080/api/v1/webhooks/stripe');

item.name: FR6 — Cancellation & Stripe Refund
item.description: Module: payments-ticketing. Pre-req: confirmed booking (BOOKING_REF set).

item.name: FR7 — Coupon Engine & Discounts
item.description: Module: promotions. Admin creates promos/coupons, user validates and applies them.

item.name: FR8 — Review Submission & Moderation
item.description: Module: engagement. Pre-req: confirmed booking. BookingConfirmedEvent must have unlocked ReviewEligibility.

exec: console.log('Status:', data.status, '(wait 1-2s for OpenAI moderation → PUBLISHED)');
console.log('Wait 2s then check DB: SELECT status FROM reviews ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1; → Expected: REJECTED');

item.name: 8.6 ❌ Submit Second Review for Same Event (Duplicate)
FR10 — Seat Lock State Machine (Hero Feature)
item.description: Distributed seat locking via Redis + Spring State Machine. Tests full state transitions.

exec: console.log('State: AVAILABLE — seats ready to lock, count:', totalAvail);
console.log('State: SOFT_LOCKED → Verify: redis-cli ttl seat:lock:' + pm.environment.get('SEAT_ID_1'));
console.log('Verify: SELECT status FROM seats WHERE id = ' + pm.environment.get('SEAT_ID_1') + '; → AVAILABLE');

item.name: 10.5 View Seat Lock Audit Log (via Admin)
A.4 Cancel Slot (Bulk Cancel All Bookings)
A.5 Retry Eventbrite Sync for Slot
🔁 Mock Eventbrite Admin
item.description: Direct calls to the Mock Eventbrite service (port 8888) for debugging and state reset.

item.name: EB.5 Trigger Eventbrite Webhook (Slot Cancel Simulation)
